name: Rolling Stone: Stories From the Edge
original_name: Rolling Stone: Stories From the Edge
overview: A chronicle of the last 50 years of American music, politics and popular culture through the perspective of Rolling Stone magazine. An exhilarating visual and musical experience of the magazine’s history featuring performances by a dazzling array of artists and showcasing the groundbreaking work of its writers.
